title: Samsara - INFINITY27
shortDescription: Freelance gameplay systems shipped for Samsara, a live UE5 title developed through INFINITY27.
fullDescription:
Samsara is a live UE5 game for which I contributed gameplay systems as a freelance developer, following completion of the INFINITY27 UE5 skills bootcamp. I built two systems following a real production workflow: a stacking attack speed passive in Blueprint with VFX feedback scaling to stack count, and a modular health regeneration Actor Component in C++ supporting flat and stat-scaled regen via a timer-based approach.

Both were designed with exposed variables for designer tuning and integrated cleanly into the existing codebase. I also diagnosed and fixed live bugs including multi-hit collision causing incorrect stack accumulation and a flat-vs-percentage scaling error in attack speed. Work continued post-delivery, extending both systems into boss drop behaviour and refactoring Blueprint graphs for maintainability.
